name: community namespacing: rule named "foo" can exist in both _community/acme/ and _community/contoso/ (distinct ids)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --format json > out.txt 2>/dev/null && grep -E '"id":"acme/foo"' out.txt 1>&2 && grep -E '"id":"contoso/foo"' out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
setup:
printf 'source:
  id: a
  authoritative_publisher: Acme
  authoritative_url: https://a.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
rules:
  - {id: foo, name: foo, description: x, detector: x}
' > tree/_community/acme/x.yaml

printf 'source:
  id: c
  authoritative_publisher: Contoso
  authoritative_url: https://c.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
rules:
  - {id: foo, name: foo, description: x, detector: x}
' > tree/_community/contoso/x.yaml
